nodes.name: bindy-system Namespace
nodes.description: Kubernetes namespace hosting the Bindy operator and the BIND9 operand workloads it manages.

nodes.name: Bindy Operator
nodes.description: Rust controller-manager (ghcr.io/firestoned/bindy, args=[run]). Leader-elected Deployment that hosts every reconciler (ClusterBind9Provider, Bind9Cluster, Bind9Instance, DNSZone, and the 8 record reconcilers) and exposes Prometheus metrics on :8080.

nodes.name: Kubernetes API Server
nodes.description: Cluster control plane and reconcile source of truth. All controllers watch and patch resources here; bindcar validates operator tokens via TokenReview.

nodes.name: ValidatingAdmissionPolicies
nodes.description: Seven CEL-based ValidatingAdmissionPolicies (acl, zone-name, rndc-strict, pod-shape, dnssec-policy, operator-workload-sa, record-value) enforced by the API server on CR and pod admission.

nodes.name: ClusterBind9Provider (CRD)
nodes.description: Cluster-scoped CRD declaring platform DNS infrastructure that spans namespaces.

nodes.name: Bind9Cluster (CRD)
nodes.description: Namespaced CRD describing a logical DNS cluster with primary/secondary replica counts.

nodes.name: Bind9Instance (CRD)
nodes.description: Namespaced CRD describing a single BIND9 server (role Primary or Secondary).

nodes.name: DNSZone (CRD)
nodes.description: Namespaced CRD describing an authoritative zone; selects target instances (clusterRef / clusterProviderRef / bind9InstancesFrom) and member records (recordsFrom).

nodes.name: DNS Record CRDs
nodes.description: Eight namespaced record CRDs (ARecord, AAAARecord, CNAMERecord, MXRecord, TXTRecord, NSRecord, SRVRecord, CAARecord) associated to a zone by label selector.

nodes.name: BIND9 Operand Pod
nodes.description: Deployment created per Bind9Instance. A two-container pod running the DNS server plus the bindcar management sidecar.

nodes.name: BIND9 named
nodes.description: Container 'bind9'. Authoritative DNS server serving UDP/TCP :5353 as non-root UID 101 with no added capabilities (unprivileged port).

nodes.name: bindcar API Sidecar
nodes.description: Container 'api' (ghcr.io/firestoned/bindcar). HTTP API on :8080 for zone add/del/notify/status; runs rndc / nsupdate against the local named.

nodes.name: BIND9 Service
nodes.description: Kubernetes Service exposing DNS (:53 UDP/TCP -> container :5353) and the bindcar API (port 80 -> 8080).

nodes.name: DNS Client
nodes.description: Any resolver or workload issuing DNS queries against the served zones.

relationships.description: bindy-system contains the operator and the BIND9 operands
The operand pod runs named plus the bindcar sidecar
enforces CEL policies on CR and pod admission
selects member records via label selector
add / delete / notify zones (SA token, TokenReview)
